resolved_decisions.browser_strategy: BrowserClient protocol with CursorBrowserAdapter and ExternalBrowserMcpAdapter

assumptions: Kwork auth via Chrome session; user logs in manually before daemon start
LightRAG accessed via MCP search_knowledge_base mode mix
Excel journal schema matches Zerocode2md ResponseJournal
FL.ru and Telegram adapters stubbed but not enabled in MVP config
open_questions: Reuse existing Telegram bot token vs dedicated bot — resolved at .env setup by user
constraints: No Kwork password in code or env
Logs must not contain API keys or full response bodies with secrets
